name: Amber Rum Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and lightly flour a 10-inch tube pan or 12-cup bundt pan.
3. In a bowl, combine the cake mix, eggs, 1/2 cup nectar, oil, 1/2 cup rum, and nuts. Mix at medium speed.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 55-60 minutes or until tested done.
6. Cool for 15 minutes.
7. Prepare glaze by combining 1/2 cup apricot nectar and sugar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
8. Continue boiling for several minutes until the desired consistency is reached.
9. Stir in the remaining ingredients into the glaze.
10. Pour the glaze over the warm cake, brushing it evenly onto the top and sides of the cake.
11. Serve on a serving plate.
